prompt: Aerial drone photography of a lush green farm pasture. In the field, there are two distinct groups of animals: a flock of white sheep and a flock of black sheep. Separating them is a heavy, permanent, dry-stone farm wall. However, the wall is architecturally absurd: instead of a smooth, logical dividing line, the heavy stone wall violently zig-zags and fractures in erratic, sharp, jagged right angles. The wall goes completely out of its way to create a ridiculous, tight, sprawling maze-like loop specifically to encircle one single stray black sheep that has wandered deep into the white sheep's side of the field. The massive stone structure is an unmaintainable, chaotic labyrinth built to achieve a completely perfect separation of the flocks. Golden hour lighting, photorealistic, highly detailed, physical realism. --no text, diagrams, glowing lines, floating labels, holograms, digital art, graphs, UI, grids, nodes
metaphor: A heavy stone wall separates white and black sheep. Instead of a smooth dividing line, it absurdly zigzags and loops to perfectly isolate single stray outliers, representing an overfitted decision boundary.
